text:
F0500A_READG_AVLBL_CD F0500A Interview for Activity Preferences: Reading Materials Available Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they have books, newspapers and magazines to read while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no choice
9=No response or non-responsive
^=Blank (skip pattern)
188 F0500B_MUSIC_CD
